title: ICAI Revised Code of Ethics (13th edition) - A Quick Update!
content:
# ICAI Revised Code of Ethics (13th edition) - A Quick Update!

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne **Revised Code of Ethics (13th edition)** announce kiya hai. This is a significant development, applicable from April 01, 2026, with some provisions effective earlier.

Here are the key takeaways from this revision:

*   **Effective Date:** The revised Code of Ethics (13th edition), comprising Volume-I, II & III, is applicable from **April 01, 2026**. However, the provision for "Assessment and evaluation of Social Impact, CSR Impact, Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting, and the like" under Management Consultancy and other services became effective from December 11, 2025.
*   **Global Convergence:** This 13th edition aligns the ICAI Code of Ethics with the 2024 edition of the International Ethics Standards Board for Accountants (IESBA) Code of Ethics.
*   **Advertising Guidelines:** Major amendments have been made to the advertisement guidelines, offering more flexibility to CA firms to enhance their visibility and compete globally.
*   **Sustainability Assurance:** New Ethical Standards for Sustainability Assurance, based on IESBA standards, have been incorporated.
*   **Expanded Service Offerings:** The list of Management Consultancy and Other Services (MCS) that CAs can provide has been expanded. This now includes areas like social impact assessment, AI-related services, and forensic accounting.
*   **NOCLAR Applicability:** Provisions related to Responding to Non-Compliance with Laws and Regulations (NOCLAR) now have extended applicability to all listed entities and their material subsidiaries, strengthening auditor responsibility.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post/revised-code-of-ethics-13th-edition-30-05-2026)

*Published on: 31 May 2026*
